
# Ex 2
A single phase motor absorbs:
$P=2300W$
$E=230V$
$f=50Hz$
$PF=0.3$
Fin the apparent power S supplied to the motor
 $PF=\frac{P}{S}$
 $\implies S=\frac{P}{PF}=\frac{2300}{0.3}$
 $S=7666.66Va$

$P=270W$
$PF=0.2$
$U=130V_{RMS}$
$R_{LINE}=8Ω$
Find P absorbed by $R_{LINE}$
$P=I?R_{LINE}$
$I=?$
$PF=\frac{P}{S}=\frac{P}{IU}$
$I=\frac{P}{PF·U}=\frac{270}{0.2·130}$
$I=10.38A$
$P=I^{2}·R_{LINE}=(10.38)^{2}·8=861.95W$

$$
\begin{cases}
P=I^{2}·R \\
S=VI \\
PF=\frac{P}{S}
\end{cases}
$$

$C=3µF$
$L=0.1H$
$R=60Ω$
$e(t)=5\sqrt{ 2 }\sin(\omega t)V$

RMS voltage of the coil at resonance condition

$\omega=\frac{1}{\sqrt{ LC }}=0.000547722557505$
$U_{LRMS}=?$
$I_{RMS}=\frac{5}{60}$
$Z_{total}=R$
$U_{LRMS}=83mA·|Z_{L}|=15.15V$
$|Z_{L}|=\omega_{r}L=182.6Ω$

RLC circuit

Find the quality factor
$Q=\frac{1}{R}\sqrt{ \frac{L}{C} }$
